title: Volume 1 Chapter 2: The Mysterious Entity Omega
series: Reincarnated as a Mob in a Magical Girl Anime
content: Chapter 2: The Mysterious Entity Omega
"Something... like this...!"
"Fufu, it's no use resisting. It makes it harder for me to drain your energy efficiently."
"Ugh... Lu... na... run... away..."
With those final words, my last companion lost consciousness.
I couldn't do anything but watch as my friends were struck down right before my eyes.
Move... move...! I have to save everyone...!
I tried to encourage myself over and over, but my body completely refused to move, acting entirely against my will.
"Oh my... whatever is the matter? Crying so much... fufufu, how pitiful."
The demon woman stared at me with a mocking sneer, tightening the restraints on my companions even further.
This demon most likely appeared using a teleportation formula that had been embedded inside that small-fry demon Rulerayagus.

Which means this demon is the main threat... an assassin sent by the demon side specifically to crush us... The fact that the demons have been so weak lately was all a trap designed to create this exact moment when our guard was down...!
"Fufu, that face... it's wonderful... such a very nice expression... I am going to take my time slowly, carefully converting you into energy inside me."
"Do whatever you want..."
If it means living all alone in a world without those girls... I don't care anymore... my life doesn't matter...
I weakly let go of my sword and gave up all resistance.

"Oh my, have you perhaps given in to despair? How tragic, those friends of yours who protected you won't be able to rest in peace... If that's what you wish... I'll put you out of your misery right now...!"
The next moment, sharp, blade-like tentacles were launched straight at me.
A direct hit would be instant death.
Ah... I wasn't able to accomplish anything, was I...
As I closed my eyes and waited for death, the dry sound of clapping echoed through the area.
"Bravo, bravo. A battle tactic utilizing tentacles... you really do have some magnificent taste."
When I opened my eyes, the tentacles that had been closing in on me were sliced to pieces, and a mysterious man was floating between the demon and me.
The man was clad in a black robe, and from the depths of his hood, an eerie mask was staring intently at us.
More than anything, I felt an overwhelming, terrifying pressure radiating from him.
This man was unmistakably strong.
"Gyaaaaaah!! My tentacles!! You bastard...! Who the hell are you!!"
"My name is Omega... The one who peers into the abyss of gloom."
The man spoke in a low voice that seemed to rumble through the earth itself.
"Luna of the Silver, do not die. You are indispensable talent for my ideal world."
When the man held his hand out toward me, the wounds on my body healed, and my magic power rapidly began to recover.
A-amazing... my injuries are completely gone...
"Don't look away from me!!"
"Do not move, or you will die."
The moment I thought the man's finger twitched slightly, a tremendous wind pressure was generated, slicing the demon's body cleanly in two.
"Wha, huh? Eh...?"
"I told you not to move... next time, I will send your head flying."
What did he just do? I couldn't see anything...
Is this man's ability related to slashing? Or was it that light that healed me? I don't understand...!
[img]https://i.imgur.com/T0R8TUy.jpeg
"I am a demon! Th-this level of...!!"
"It is useless. You can no longer regenerate your body."
"Wh-why... why isn't my regeneration...!"
"That is enough. Let us end this."
"Don't mock meeeeeee!!"

With a roar filled with deep-seated resentment, an innumerable amount of sharp tentacles were unleashed toward the man. Having completely abandoned us magical girls who were her original targets, she directed every single tentacle into an attack on the man.
The moment my friends were freed, I dashed out and managed to safely recover all of them.
"Thank goodness... everyone is still breathing... That man cast a healing spell on these girls as well..."
They had just lost consciousness, so they should wake up after a little while.
All that was left was for us to retreat, but...
I cast a quick glance toward the man.
The myriad of tentacles that had tried to attack him were already beginning to disintegrate from their tips; the battle was effectively already decided.
"Are you satisfied now? I can let you go if you leave right this second. Hurry up and go home. Come on, hurry."
"Uuuugh... Who would ever run away... I am a demon... There is no way I would ever lose to a... fake demon like you—"
"Is that so... What a true shame."
At the exact moment the man muttered those words, cracks began to run across the entirety of the demon's body, propagating outward.
"My body is cracking—"
The demon showed an expression of terror for the first time, but the cracking did not stop.
"A... ghh—"
"...Haa... Good grief, and she was such a precious piece of talent, too... What a waste..."
Having watched the demon vanish into dust, he muttered something to himself in a disappointed whisper.
"Hey... just who are you? What is your objective?"
I fearfully called out to him.
Truth be told, I was a little scared.
No matter how much he had helped us, that power was dangerous.
But even more than that, I found myself wanting to know more about him.
He stared intently at me through that cold mask.
"There is no need for you to know... Do not involve yourself with me."
Saying only that, he flew off somewhere at a tremendous speed.
"Omega..."
As a magical girl tasked with protecting the peace of the citizens, I know I shouldn't trust someone like him whose allegiances are currently unknown... but I... him...
Leaving with a slight feeling of ambiguity lingering in my heart, I took my companions and left the area.
